title: İstanbul Okan University
content:
User Services

MENU

WORKING HOURS

EVERYDAY OF THE WEEK: 08.30 - 02.00

INTERNET OPPORTUNITIES

The University has 50 computers in 3 libraries located at Tuzla campus for users to access the information they need over the Internet. Thanks to the wireless connection network, which is completely free, Internet access is provided from every point of the library.

All faculty members and students can easily use library computers for any educational and scientific purposes.

LENDING SERVICES

All students, faculty members and administrative staff of Istanbul Okan University can utilize loan services and borrow books from the library, except users who are unable to present a valid Okan University ID.

Counseling resources, periodicals, non-printed theses, rare works of manuscripts and printings, and publications and standards in the reserve and textbooks section are not borrowed.

Members having overdue books or fines are not allowed to borrow publications.

All users are allowed to borrow 2 books for 15 days.

Interlibrary Loan Services

Books that are not in our library collection can be provided from other university libraries within the terms of the Interlibrary Loan Services (ILL), and thus presented to Faculty members.
